Health_Department_Name: Placer County Health and Human Services
Program_Description: WIC is a Supplemental Nutrition Program to help families eat well, be active and stay healthy.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children up to age 5.
Eligibility_Requirements: Eligibility is based on income and being in one of the categories such as a pregnant woman or a child up to age 5.
Application_Process: Apply for benefits online or contact the WIC Program for an enrollment appointment.
Required_Documentation: Identification, proof of address, proof of income.
